title: Tyffix
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image=[[File:Tyffix.jpg]] |name=Tyffix |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], [[Thustra/Legends|Thustra]]The events of ''[[Jedi: Yoda]]'' take place shortly after [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi's]] escape from [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to sixteen [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]] or [[21 BBY/Legends|20.66 BBY]]. Therefore, the [[battle of Thustra]], including Tyffix's [[Death/Legends|death]] on [[Thustra/Legends|Thustra]], must fall in 21 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]. |species=[[Gand/Legends|Gand]]''[[Jedi: Yoda]]'' |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters= |apprentices=[[Cal (Jedi)|Cal]] }} {{Quote|My Master taught me that to fight like a warrior—to think like a conqueror—was the only way I'd survive.|Cal|}} '''Tyffix''' was a [[Gand/Legends|Gand]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], Tyffix and their [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Cal (Jedi)|Cal]], were dispatched to lead a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] force on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Thustra/Legends|Thustra]] when the world's populace attempted to secede from the Republic. Shortly after arriving on the planet, the Republic forces were [[Battle of Thustra|attacked]] by the [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] [[Sephi/Legends|Sephi]], and Tyffix was [[Death/Legends|killed]] when a suicide [[Bomber/Legends|bomber]] [[Ramming/Legends|destroyed]] the [[Thustra Republic command center|Republic command center]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|The Sephi have tanks here… and here.''"
"''Master Tyffix, have your men fall back from the outer—|A clone officer and Tyr, moments before the command center explodes|}} [[File:Cal_HS.jpg|thumb|left|While a Jedi Master, Tyffix took Cal (pictured) as their Padawan.]] A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gand/Legends|Gand]], Tyffix was a member of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] who held the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Forced to wear a [[Breath mask/Legends|breath mask]] in order to survive in an [[Oxygen/Legends|oxygen]]-rich [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]],''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]'' Tyffix selected the young [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Cal (Jedi)|Cal]] as their [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] the youth to think like a [[Soldier/Legends|warrior]]. In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], Tyffix and Cal were part of a Republic [[Clone trooper/Legends|task force]] sent to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Thustra/Legends|Thustra]] when the [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] [[Sephi/Legends|Sephi]] population wanted to secede from the Republic. What was originally planned to be a show of force soon turned into a [[Blood/Legends|bloody]] [[Battle of Thustra|battle]], in which Sephi [[Death/Legends|suicide]] [[Bomber/Legends|bombers]] inflicted heavy casualties on the Republic [[Trooper/Legends|troops]]. While discussing strategy with fellow [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Master [[Tyr]] and a [[Unidentified clone officer (Thustra)|clone officer]] inside the [[Thustra Republic command center|Republic command center]], Tyffix was victim to the [[Ramming/Legends|Sephi tactics]] when a suicide bomber destroyed the command tent, killing all present except Tyr's Padawan, [[Pix (Jedi)|Pix]], whom her Master had [[Telekinesis/Legends|Force-pushed]] out of the tent before the explosion. Cal saw the explosion from afar and called out for his master. Cal and Pix then sent a message to the Jedi and Republic on the planet [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] informing them of Tyffix and Tyr's deaths and calling for help. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Master Tyffix!''"
"''Cal… It's too late.|Cal and Pix, after their Masters' deaths|}} Tyffix taught Cal that thinking like a warrior and a conqueror would be the only way to survive the Clone Wars, a lesson the Padawan took to [[Heart/Legends|heart]] but one that ultimately led to the Padawan's death later during the battle. ==Powers and abilities== As a Jedi Master of the Jedi Order, Tyffix was Force-sensitive and trained to [[Force power/Legends|wield]] [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] at a high level. ==Equipment== The Jedi wore a breath mask and donned [[Color/Legends|brown]]-colored [[Jedi apparel/Legends|Jedi robes]]. ==Behind the scenes== Tyffix appeared in ''[[Jedi: Yoda]]'', the fifth and final issue of the [[Star Wars: Jedi (one-shots)|''Star Wars: Jedi'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic series]], which was written by [[Jeremy Barlow]], illustrated by [[HOON]], and released on [[July 21]], [[2004]].{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54285/star_wars_jedi_-_yoda_2004_1|text=Star Wars: Jedi - Yoda (2004) #1}} ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi: Yoda]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{CSWECite|I||Cal (1)}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Tyffix |it=Tyffix |pl=Tyffix }} [[Category:Gand]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]] [[Category:Jedi Generals]] [[Category:Post-Ruusan Jedi Masters]]
